reviews.review_description: I woke up on a sandy beach and saw 3 men with assault rifles. One of them handed me a pickaxe and forced me to farm for him. They then gave me a crossbow and told me zo go enslave another person like me, so i did. They then forced both of us to farm wood and metal zo build up their shack. After a while i got pretty tired and asked for some food. They didnt like that and shot me in the leg, knocked me out and put me at the edge of a forest. I then managed to go back to my house. After calming down i bought strayed and the same thing happened in game.

I buy the game, I build a base, I look over the hill next to my base and see a 20 story tall 15 wall to tc base, I walk up and ask for some loot, they enslave me and trap me in a cage, I escape the cage with my rock, I’m inside their base, I find loot, they try to kill me but I stole their metal gear, things get heated as I try to get out, they shoot a rocket straight through my skull and I respawn at my base only to find out my entire base is gone, I get sad, then I build another base, cycle repeats. Very fun game

reviews.review_title: Strayed is not for the weak
reviews.review_description: I started build a nice little 2 by 2 then found my first stg and I thought wow this games pretty fun until I killed one full metal kit he came to my base called me every slur I have ever heard of then told me he was gonna circumcise me with an electrical socket then he brought a team of ten people and shot 20 rockets into my wood two by 2 I highly recommend

reviews.review_title: Strayed vr is not for the weak
reviews.review_description: I spawned in on my first wipe and immediately got captured by 4 men with rocks and they forced me to dance for them until they told me to stop. Once u stopped dancing for them they said to build them a base and farm materials for their benefits. Once I was done farming they said to go to every monument and get a lot of loot (which I did) once I went back to their base (that I built) they shot me in my head and said that it wasn’t enough loot. At this point I logged off and didn’t get on until wipe day 3 once I got on I seen this massive 15 man clan base and they told me to walk into their base for free loot. Once I walked into their base I got burned alive by a booby trap. On day 4 I countered a raid and got metal gear and a assault rifle I killed 1 naked person and then this  metal geared guy just shot a rocket straight at my abdomen. Great game just make sure to enslave people before they enslave you

The community in this game i so creative they made a way to kidnap people. Let me explain. I spawned on the beach naked with a rock and a torch. A dude with full metal points a pistol at my Mr.clean head and tell me to get in the back of his helicopter. I get in and get taken to a high quality metal clan base. I'm then forced into a room with another inmate. He starts hitting me with his rock and i die an amazing death.

reviews.review_title: I feel like a kid in iraq
reviews.review_description: I wake up naked on a beach and I’m talked to by some random guys. They tell me that I look like I just signed up for the military with my bald head and then call me several slurs. Then I walk to to the snow biome and freeze to death. I end up back at the same beach talking to the same guys who call me slurs again. I find an ak off a dead body die to a kid with an ak.then find that same ak kid dead take his stuff build a base I counter a raid. I felt like the average Russian kid traveling to Iraq.

reviews.review_title: Great Game Concept but Careless Devs.
reviews.review_description: Strayed is a Great Game, but like any other game it has cheaters and players that like to exploit flaws that developers create. You can go around and gather resources and materials and make your base so big that you think you and your base can defend raiders. I've played this game a few months after it was released and played it everyday for a couple years however it has finally come down to the fact that regardless of how many times you report a cheater, there's always another player cheating. I was able to report and record clip of a cheater and seen they have banned player, but that doesn't fix the problem if they don't fix it from happening again. Just ban a player and leave the problem for the next player to cheat only to get the same Scripted Rebuttal when you submit a report again. So if you play this game just know that it's an unfair fight and a waste of time because your gonna see some player flying across the map killing players with ease, blowing up your base with endless rockets because they're running around map like flash gathering resources really quick, or getting killed by an invisible player. Join the strayed discord and see how many players are calling out cheaters, yeah some maybe kids with no skill getting they're butt spanked and getting mad because they die and sometimes it's legit pvp and it's lack of skill but you'll know when it's a cheater no doubt. Don't see how Meta hasn't disbanded this game from the shelf and refunded everybody they're money back.

I was playing the game for about ten minutes until a 4 man with metal armor capture me and force me to hit a pick axe against a stone ceiling while they called me slurs and threatened as I got through the stone I fall down and get shot by a shotgun trap they told me to run into it saying it would give me an Ak instead I got killed and then after respawning I get brutally raped by some rock kids on spawn beach great experience would recommend

The game is great but with some stuff I think they should add like not being able to hold the rock with 2 hands like rust is dumb especially since this is inspired by rust but over all it’s super fun and I highly recommend getting the game and there adding farming and animals and new guns soon so i can’t wait

reviews.review_title: Strayed vr is not for weak
reviews.review_description: I spawn in get loot and got captured and enslaved me and forced me to farm for them and the I got them a ton of wood now I’m there leader and I make them farm for me until my base got blown up with 4 full metel kids with rockets and they shot a rocket through my skull saying you are unworthy.

me and my friend built a nice base with towers gates and lots and lots of turrets. we also have light and electricity running throughout the base at all times. every night, for the past 3 days, someone dodges and climbs around the turrets to turn off one turret at the front of the base that also cuts our power and leaves. every night, we hear the power cut off and come outside to find vr houdini running away with his little torch. we have tried to catch him off guard at the times he usually cuts them off but as soon as our guard is down, boom power off. he has no intention on raiding or stealing anything of ours. just purely for sport. me and my teammate are going crazy trying to find him aswell as dealing with his little army of other houdinis trying to cut other power. some succesfull some not. we have been on vr nonstop of the fear of him coming back and taking the rest of the turrets. houdini has not been caught

reviews.review_title: Probably the best vr game of all time.
reviews.review_description: This game is genuinely so fun and addicting. I had a giant base with atleast 30 turrets but was then betrayed by 2 of my teammates. Within a day, me and my 7 other teammates grinded 60 rockets to take the base and all the loot back from those kids. We raided it and everyone was so happy to get revenge.

I spawned on the beach I start running up to the middle of the map and a Russian clan came to me put an ak to my head and called me a slur in Russian and the only word they knew in the English language was work so I did for them then I escaped and I made a 2 by 2 and then some little 8 year old screamed slurs outside my base for over 30 minutes and about 1 hour later the Russian clan found my base and they shot over a line of rockets into it  (strayed and repeat)

reviews.review_title: Best game I have ever played
reviews.review_description: I have played a number of games like for front, bleachers, and grim but the one game that stood out was this game because grim is cool and all but strayed just does it better its way less laggy and it has better update and the community is absolutely awesome probably the best community I have ever met and if the biweekly or the solo or trio server it just makes the game so much better so I think this game is the best vr game there is and I see a lot of potential in this game I am excited for what it will become.

You need to try this game it may be in beta and have glitches like any other game and it cost 20$ I doesn't matter this game is so funny it's a rust like game and the devs did and amazing job ik tou will love this game if tou like survival game it's probably my new favorite

It is basically rust in Vr. With friends makes it a f@ck ton better. Though I would like to say they should add private servers, and a friends list to automatically find your friends and join em. But other than those things the game is awesome and I say that it is worth the 20$ especially with the new frontiers update coming out

reviews.review_title: Good game but a few suggestions
reviews.review_description: Could you add animals like deer so the only source of food isn’t apples. also could you make the wipe happen later instead of Friday. I understand that the servers would get too crowded and laggy but maybe push it back just one day. Also this is an edit but can you make it so you can grow berries or vegetables for food too and then you can make wine with some fruits and it will make you full health and/or it will make you warmer and you can sell it for a good price also can you be able to grow weed and make cigs to refill your heart by 15 or take it down a little and can you make fist fights so if someone enslaves another they can build a mini colosseum to make them fight and make it more fun and also I won’t enslave anyone partly because I’m not really good at it.

I say that this game is one of the best rust VR games I have ever seen I mean it because it’s better than grim no offensive grim is seeing this. I love your game still but I like straight a lot because it is really fun and yes, there might be a few toxic people here and there like a few people named DK01 yeah I’m talking to you DK if you see this you kicked me from that group just because I’m not good at the game. I’ll also this guy has abused me ever since I got the game just letting you know 
￼￼￼

As much as I play this game. Every time there's always a clan that's dominating the area and im gonna talk about how crucial it is to add solo servers. Strayed VR has promoted clans to the highest degree. For example, many server's are now used to absolutely pamper these clans. ( 2x server's or CLAN server's) And the problem is that   they have the most worst priorities ever in this game. Whether it be fixing bugs or adding a new " galaxy " skin. This game is a double edged sword.    Its rust ( obviously ) on vr! But unlike rust that has solo server's, they just let clans piss everyone off. But hey I get it because if you add solo servers, everybody gonna move to that server and all these 4-16 year old clans will leave the game. I seriously wish this game to be better. But instead it's a horrible excuse for a vr rust game. I rather go to grim vr instead.

Great game second favourite vr game but it’s not first but the playerbase is so bad like I know getting killed and raided is part of the game but this game is full of fat chuds who camp and they are also the actual least skilled players as the only go for the people with nothing but overall insanely good game

I have been playing strayed for 2 and a half years now and this is by far one of the best rust vr game.

But some of the ting I wish to see in strayed is 
*backpacks 
*more vehicles and boats 
*base decor like wall paper and string lights 
* bug fixes and better anti cheat

My friend bought me this game thinking i would like it i've tried rust hated it i've played a little bit of ark and stopped playing it as well because that game also wasn't fun me and my friend both agreed to stop playing this it's literally just rust vr work for work for 3 hours just to lose all your work in a 5 minute raid this game is remaining uninstalled and i will never reinstall it again me and my friend both agreed to stop playing this game i'd rather play games that aren't waste time simulators

VERY FUN  it has all the things i like witch is action and gun fight. Also the building part is just great. I think there should be skins for crate they need it so people can sort and so nobody asks where is this and etc.

PLEASE ADD BACKPACKS. I feel that when I kill 4 full kits, I can't carry anything. It's super annoying that after you raid somebody and they're LOADED, you need like 7 people to carry everything. "Just make multiple trips" way too risky, ESPECIALLY if a group of raid counters won't hop off. Backpacks would be such a good addition to the game. Oh, and also make ladders not able to be placed on high walls. It would make conpounds actually  useful. But make keycards harder to get , everybody just gets guns instantly, i feel like, and it's annoying. Another good addition would be armored doors, i feel like you need 10 garage doors to core to make it not easy to door raid.  It would also make it take longer for raiding, making it take more time and skill due to the pvp/ raid counters. Which imo it would make the game funner for one of the main aspects of the game (pvp/raiding). Everything else is done very well. Just add these things, and this game will be a certified hood classic

reviews.review_title: The server wiped as soon as I got good
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend were playing and we got lots of good stuff from killing this guy. We went back to base and then it said server is resetting. We didn’t think much about it because when service reset we still have our base but no it wiped we got RPG’s STG.s and lots of more stuff when we join back our base had been deleted and so of all our stuff it was in the server us 2x #2 this is a really good game but you just have to stop doing this. It’s not the first time that it’s happened.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for playing Strayed. We're sorry to hear about the poor wipe timing. The servers reset every Friday at 6pm EST, unless the server is bi-weekly, in which case it wipes every other Friday (every 2 weeks). If you're looking for a longer wipe we recommend checking out the bi-weekly servers. Thank you again for playing Strayed!

reviews.review_description: Ive been playing for a while now and I’ve been through clans raids all that stuff but the one key detail about this game is the building as long as you got something in mind build in I love the creativity of this game I love buying tge newest skins for the game every detail is amazing.

So I spawned in and saw a group of like 13 people all with armour and guns so I try to go up to them and got blasted to a million pieces so I spawned in again in the middle of the desert and starve to death great game five stars⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
There needs to be an age enforcement. The whole game is just 10 year olds running around screaming the n word 24/7. That’s it, that’s the game. N word simulator.

reviews.review_title: Great game but room for more
reviews.review_description: I understand there may be plans to add animals you can hunt in the future but it would bean amazing feature to have ASAP. Giving players an alternative to apples that gives even more hunger and health. And maybe nerf apples a bit. Secondly i and a few others would love for the ability to host their own private server which is just the same as the already made public ones just requires an invite or room code for players to join. And join/leave messages for these private servers. And finally maybe a few new entities. Fish in the ocean for food and sharks to give scuba diving players a challenge. And special underwater loot with better or increased item rates. Tigers in the desert for a challenge to runners but decreased spawn rate. And they inly attack players under a certain amount of health. Deer in the woods and for the snowy area add vultures which when in a certain proximity it checks every 5 seconds and each check give the vulture a 1 in 100 chance to attack the player. You can also kill them for meet. Just a few suggestions. Overall great game.
This is the best game I ever played. I recommend getting this game and if you need help with anything just add me an oculus best game keep up the great work I love killing people in this game.

reviews.review_title: Pretty good game but needs balancing
reviews.review_description: I was playing with some friends because they encouraged me to play with them and it was fun but on my life i want to spawn in unique locations the spawn rate is ONLY on desert and when a wipe happens the spawn is hell on earth, genuinely a good game but balance the spawning locations to be more unique so I don’t get spawn killed in desert every time

reviews.review_title: Love the game with my heart
reviews.review_description: i build a base grub a kit and go home, i'm like a eco raid caveman then all the sudden when i wake up im raided and then the cycle repeats 10/10

spawned in and immediately got hit in the back of the head with a rock. I thought it was over, but I woke up in a 1x1 stone room with three guys wearing wolf headdresses standing over me. They didn't kill me; they just told me that if I wanted to live, I had to be their "official base DJ."
For two hours, I had to stand on their roof and pretend to turn invisible knobs while humming techno songs into my mic whenever they came home from a raid. It was actually kind of vibey until I tried to hop off the roof and make a break for the forest. I got about fifty feet before a guy with a crossbow told me my "set wasn't over yet" and dragged me back.
I eventually found a discarded pistol in a crate and managed to take them out while they were sorting loot, but as I was running away with their stuff, a group of "pro" players in full hazmat suits flew by on a mini-copter. They didn't even shoot me—they just landed, took my pants, and told me I was now the "guardian of the bridge." They built a wall around me and told me I’m not allowed to leave until I collect 10,000 wood for them.
It’s been four hours. I’ve forgotten what my real family looks like. My arms are tired from chopping trees.
10/10. I am the bridge guardian now. Do not cross without wood.
